name: Virtual Greens Golf Club
address: 6069 River Rd Building D, Suite 2, St. George, UT 84790
about: Virtual Greens Golf Club is an indoor golf facility powered by TrackMan technology in St. George, Utah. The venue offers climate-controlled bays for year-round play, featuring real-course golf with shot-by-shot analytics. Members and drop-ins can book time online to play, practice, or take lessons. The facility is equipped with TrackMan technology for accurate data tracking and includes amenities like free beverages and 24/7 access for members. Pricing options include both hourly drop-in rates and membership plans with varying levels of access and benefits.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan technology provides accurate shot data for game improvement
24/7 member access and flexible booking options
Climate-controlled bays for year-round play regardless of weather
Partnership with Southern Utah Golf Academy for expert coaching
Complimentary beverages and a clean, family-friendly environment

food_and_drink.notes: Not explicitly mentioned; BYOB status unclear

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator bays with radar-based tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether you need to bring your own clubs. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for specific equipment requirements.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue mentions complimentary drinks but does not specify a policy on outside food and drink. It is best to inquire directly with the venue for their policy on bringing your own items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Plan on about one hour per golfer for a full 18. Solo rounds usually take 60–75 minutes. Time can vary based on putting settings, mulligans, and pace. Sessions book in 1–2 hour blocks.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as fun for the whole family and kid-friendly, with complimentary drinks being a big hit for children.
